skills.name: GoHighLevel CRM
skills.tagline: Manage leads, pipelines, and SMS from chat
skills.description: Full GoHighLevel CRM integration via MCP. Search contacts, move pipeline stages, add/remove tags, send SMS messages, monitor pipeline health — all through natural language. Built on the official GHL MCP protocol.
prerequisites: Private Integration Token (PIT) from GHL Settings → Integrations → API Keys

skills.name: Google Workspace
skills.tagline: Gmail, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar, Tasks — all in one
skills.description: Complete Google Workspace integration via n8n MCP server. 44 tools covering Gmail, Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar, Tasks, and YouTube. Uses n8n's stored OAuth tokens — no additional Google API setup required.
skills.install_command: echo 'n8n-google MCP already configured in mcporter. Ensure n8n MCP server is enabled.'
prerequisites: n8n instance with Google Workspace OAuth configured
MCP server enabled in n8n (Settings → MCP)
tools: Gmail: list, send, reply, mark read/unread, delete
Drive: search, upload, download, share, move, copy, delete, create folder
Sheets: create, append row, read rows, update row, delete rows
Calendar: list, get, create, update, delete events
Tasks: list, get, create, update, delete tasks

skills.name: n8n Workflow Monitor
skills.tagline: Monitor workflows and executions from chat
skills.description: Direct n8n workflow and execution monitoring via SQLite database access. View all workflows, check execution history, monitor success/failure rates, identify bottlenecks. No API key needed — reads directly from n8n's database.
prerequisites: SSH or filesystem access to n8n's SQLite database

skills.name: Google Docs & Drive
skills.tagline: Create, read, and share Google Docs automatically
skills.description: Direct Google Drive and Docs integration using n8n's OAuth tokens. Create documents, share them with specific people, upload files to Drive. Works alongside the Google Workspace MCP skill — this is a lighter, document-focused alternative.
prerequisites: n8n with Google Drive OAuth configured

skills.name: Google AI Studio
skills.tagline: Access Gemini models and AI Studio directly
skills.description: Use Google AI Studio for embeddings, text generation, and model management. Authenticate once via browser, then use AI Studio models from any automation. Useful for building custom AI-powered workflows.

skills.name: Social Media (OAuth)
skills.tagline: Connect any social platform via OAuth — no API keys needed
skills.description: Connect Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram via Nango OAuth proxy. Nango handles the OAuth flow — you just call the API through the proxy. Perfect for posting, scheduling, and social listening.
prerequisites: OAuth app credentials from each platform (Twitter, LinkedIn, etc.)
